name: PubSub Sentiment Analysis
description: A pipeline that reads a topic from PubSub, runs sentiment analysis, and logs results.

parameters.name: input_topic
parameters.label: Input Pub/Sub Topic
parameters.helpText: The Pub/Sub topic to read from. Format: projects/<project>/topics/<topic>

parameters.name: inference_backend
parameters.label: Inference Backend
parameters.helpText: Which backend to use for remediation inference. Use 'gemma' to run Gemma locally via vLLM on a GPU worker, 'gemini' to call the Gemini API via Vertex AI, or 'adk' to run an ADK agent via the Agent Development Kit.

parameters.name: user_refresh_token
parameters.label: User Refresh Token
parameters.helpText: OAuth refresh token for Gmail API

parameters.name: user_client_id
parameters.label: User Client ID
parameters.helpText: OAuth client ID for Gmail API

parameters.name: user_client_secret
parameters.label: User Client Secret
parameters.helpText: OAuth client secret for Gmail API
